name: Cheesy Vegetable Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 4 (2/3 oz.) Slices Low-Fat Process American Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine Cottage Cheese, shredded carrot, mushrooms, sprouts, celery, radishes, and chopped green onion in a medium bowl.
2. Spoon 1/2 cup of the cottage cheese mixture onto each toasted slice of bread.
3. Spread gently to cover the spread area on each slice.
4. Cut each cheese slice into 4 triangles.
5. Arrange the triangle pieces over the cottage cheese mixture.
6. Broil 4 to 6 inches from heat or until the cheese melts.
